description_long: This helmet features a dramatic, fantasy-inspired design with a dark metallic finish and ornate gold engravings throughout its surface. The helmet is adorned with prominent, upward-curving horns and a central crest, giving it an imposing and regal appearance. The face opening is shaped to reveal the lower half of the wearer's face, with protective cheek guards extending downward. Fine, dark hair-like strands emerge from the lower rear edge, adding to its elaborate look. The surface is intricately patterned with swirling motifs and filigree, suggesting a ceremonial or high-status function. The overall construction appears robust, with a hard, glossy exterior and no visible ventilation or retention system.
description: A dark, ornate helmet with gold engravings, upward horns, and a dramatic, fantasy-inspired design. The face opening and intricate patterns give it a regal, imposing look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the helmet's central crest, symmetrical horns, and the open face area with cheek guards.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the curved horn, detailed engravings, and the profile of the face opening.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the central crest, symmetrical horn placement, and hair-like strands extending from the bottom.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ornate engravings, horn, and cheek guard profile.
attribute_graphic_design: Intricate gold filigree and swirling motifs on a dark metallic base, with a fantasy or ceremonial style.
